# Avi Vashishta

> Fullstack Developer | App Developer | Game Developer

Website: https://www.avivashishta.com
Email: avivashishta29@gmail.com
LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/avivashishta
GitHub: https://github.com/AVIVASHISHTA29

## About

Avi Vashishta is a 22-year-old fullstack developer based in India with a BTech in Computer Science from IIIT Delhi (Indraprastha Institute of Information Technology, Delhi), graduated 2024. He has a strong interest in Product Management and Entrepreneurship and is committed to delivering high-quality tech products with exceptional user experience. He has taught MERN Stack to over 100,000+ students as an instructor at a leading YC-backed EdTech platform.

Interests: Algo Trading, UI Design, Product Design, Entrepreneurship.

## Work Experience

### Software Engineer — Dock.us (YC 2021)
March 2025 – Present
Building features using the latest AI technologies on a Next.js, Node.js, GraphQL based tech stack with AWS SQS for messaging infrastructure.

### Founding Engineer — Turgon AI
October 2024 – June 2025
Led a cross-functional team to architect and deliver three AI-driven products. Reviewed and merged 500+ pull requests. Built a multi-tenant Next.js CMS controlling private club mobile apps globally with dynamic pages, real-time updates, and RBAC. Developed secure contactless check-ins using encrypted QR codes. Built a Fin-AI product with 99%+ accurate financial insights using Vercel AI SDK, LangChain, and Eleven Labs. Architected an AI-driven Expo mobile app using BFF architecture, digital wallet and ticketing system, and CI/CD pipelines with GitHub Actions. Used PostHog, Redux Toolkit, Upstash Redis, Prisma ORM, and Supabase Realtime.

### SDE — AccioJob (YC 2021)
October 2022 – October 2024
Managed 300+ features and issues (highest in team) across four product repositories. Built AI products including AI-based tutoring, unique question generation, and proctoring services. Taught Frontend Web Development to 90,000+ students online.

### Founder — STV Technologies
October 2021 – August 2022
Co-founded a freelancing firm. Completed 30+ freelance projects for international and national clients spanning full-stack web dev, app dev, Shopify, Wix/WordPress, and Unity games. Generated revenue of INR 10,00,000.

### Fullstack Intern — Attrilu
February 2022 – April 2022
Worked with Facebook (Meta) APIs. Built a web application for creators and brand marketing using Next.js and Django.

### Mobile App Intern — Fitzura
January 2022 – March 2022
Developed a fitness clothing app using React Native with a Python Django backend.

## Skills

### Frontend
React, Next.js, React Native, TypeScript, JavaScript, HTML, CSS, SCSS, Tailwind CSS, Three.js, React Three Fiber (R3F), Framer Motion, GSAP, Motion, Redux, Zustand, MUI, Ant Design

### Backend
Node.js, NestJS, Express, Python, Django, Flask, Firebase, MongoDB, REST APIs, GraphQL

### Tools & DevOps
Git, GitHub, VS Code, Vercel, Firebase, AWS (SQS, EC2), Docker, CI/CD, GitHub Actions, Unity, C#, Figma

## Projects

### AI For Messaging App
React Native, Flask, JavaScript, Python, OpenAI API
Transform your thoughts into effective messages using the power of AI. No signup required. Express your thoughts via chat or voice. Use quick chips to instantly write messages.
GitHub: https://github.com/orgs/whatsapp-ai-helper/repositories

### BOLDBot
Next.js, TypeScript, NestJS, Redux, Firebase, Framer Motion
Automating customer service for Instagram businesses. Levels up the professionalism of your business by increasing efficacy and simplifying interaction with your consumer.
GitHub: https://github.com/BoldStore/bold-bot-frontend

### BOLD Store
React Native, Expo, Firebase, JavaScript, Redux, Node.js
The world's first one-click marketplace. Fully integrated with Facebook APIs, automatically converts your feed into a store.
GitHub: https://github.com/BoldStore/MobileApp

### Infinite Rider & Infinite Rider 3D
Unity, C#
A flappy bird-style infinite game where the player has to avoid obstacles. Available in both 2D and 3D.

### Anonimo.fun
Next.js, Firebase, JavaScript, MUI
A social media app that allows users to chat anonymously — a platform where users can share thoughts and opinions without the fear of being judged.

### Podcast
- "Lockdown Wars" — Started during the pandemic with friends. A platform for people to come on and show their talent. 100,000+ streams in 2 months.

## About This Website

This portfolio (avivashishta.com) is a React 19 + TypeScript SPA built with Vite and deployed on Vercel. It features:
- 3D animations using Three.js and React Three Fiber
- Scroll animations via GSAP ScrollTrigger
- Motion (Framer Motion successor) for UI transitions
- Camera-based gesture control using MediaPipe (hand tracking, head tracking, pinch-to-click)
- An interactive terminal (Ctrl+J) with 27 commands and AI chat powered by OpenAI
- Dark/light mode with gradient theming
